name: execution_date
label: Execution Date
hint: Select execution date

name: execution_city
label: Execution City
hint: Enter execution city

name: property_type
label: Property Type
hint: Select property type

name: property_type_other
label: Other Property Type
hint: Enter other property type if any

name: property_address
label: Property Address
hint: Enter property address

name: property_registration_number
label: Property Registration Number
hint: Enter flat registration, society, or municipal property number if applicable

name: cts_survey_number
label: CTS / Survey Number
hint: Enter CTS number, city survey number, or survey number

name: property_area_sqft
label: Area (sq ft)
hint: Enter area (sq ft)

name: furnishing_status
label: Furnishing Status
hint: Select furnishing status

name: start_date
label: Agreement Start Date
hint: Select agreement start date

name: end_date
label: Agreement End Date
hint: Select agreement end date

name: lock_in_period
label: Lock-in Period (months)
hint: Enter lock-in period (months)

name: notice_period
label: Notice Period (days)
hint: Enter notice period (days)

name: monthly_rent
label: Monthly Rent
hint: Enter monthly rent

name: maintenance_charges
label: Maintenance Charges
hint: Enter maintenance charges

name: security_deposit
label: Security Deposit
hint: Enter security deposit

name: security_deposit_deductions_allowed
label: Deposit Refund Subject to Deductions
hint: Confirm unpaid bills, rent arrears, damages, or other dues may be deducted from the security deposit

name: security_deposit_deduction_basis
label: Deposit Deduction Basis
hint: Describe the items for which deductions may be made from the security deposit

name: security_deposit_refund_timeline_days
label: Deposit Refund Timeline (days)
hint: Enter number of days after vacating within which the deposit will be refunded

name: payment_mode
label: Payment Mode
hint: Select payment mode

name: rent_due_date
label: Rent Due Date (day of month)
hint: Enter rent due date (day of month)

name: late_payment_penalty_type
label: Late Payment Penalty Type
hint: Select the penalty applicable for delayed rent payment

name: late_payment_penalty_value
label: Late Payment Penalty Value
hint: Enter daily amount, monthly interest percentage, or fixed late fee

name: rent_increase_percentage
label: Annual Rent Increase (%)
hint: Enter annual rent increase (%)

name: electricity_paid_by
label: Electricity Charges Paid By
hint: Select electricity charges paid by

name: water_paid_by
label: Water Charges Paid By
hint: Select water charges paid by

name: maintenance_paid_by
label: Maintenance Paid By
hint: Select maintenance paid by

name: minor_repairs_paid_by
label: Minor Repairs Paid By
hint: Select who bears minor day-to-day repair expenses

name: minor_repair_limit
label: Minor Repair Limit
hint: Enter minor repair threshold amount, for example 500 or 1000

name: major_repairs_paid_by
label: Major Repairs Paid By
hint: Select who bears structural or major repair expenses

name: painting_cleaning_charge_type
label: Painting / Cleaning Charge Type
hint: Select how painting or cleaning charges will be handled on vacating

name: painting_cleaning_charge_value
label: Painting / Cleaning Charge Value
hint: Enter fixed charge amount if applicable

name: usage_type
label: Usage Type
hint: Select usage type

name: commercial_activity_restricted
label: Commercial Activity Restricted
hint: Confirm that no commercial or professional activity is permitted in the premises

name: number_of_occupants
label: Number of Occupants
hint: Enter number of occupants

name: pets_allowed
label: Pets Allowed
hint: Select yes or no for pets allowed

name: subletting_allowed
label: Subletting Allowed
hint: Select yes or no for subletting allowed

name: inventory_items
label: Inventory Items (JSON/List)
hint: Example: Fans: 4, AC: 2, Beds: 2

name: pre_existing_damages
label: Pre-existing Damages
hint: Indicate whether any existing damage, defect, or wear and tear is recorded at possession handover

name: pre_existing_damages_details
label: Pre-existing Damages Details
hint: Describe any cracks, seepage, stains, broken fixtures, or other existing issues

name: parking_included
label: Parking Included
hint: Confirm whether parking space is included with the premises

name: parking_type
label: Parking Type
hint: Select the type of parking included

name: parking_space_style
label: Parking Space Style
hint: Select the style of parking space

name: parking_slot_number
label: Parking Slot Number
hint: Enter slot or bay number if allotted

name: inspection_allowed
label: Owner Inspection Rights
hint: Confirm whether the owner may inspect the premises during the term

name: inspection_notice_hours
label: Inspection Notice (hours)
hint: Enter prior notice hours required before inspection, for example 24

name: police_verification_status
label: Police Verification Status
hint: Select tenant police verification status

name: renewal_allowed
label: Agreement Renewable
hint: Confirm whether the agreement may be renewed on expiry

name: renewal_rent_basis
label: Renewal Rent Basis
hint: Select how rent will be determined on renewal

name: renewal_documentation_charges_paid_by
label: Renewal Documentation Charges Paid By
hint: Select who bears documentation and registration expenses on renewal

name: early_termination_penalty
label: Early Termination Penalty
hint: Select the consequence of vacating before expiry of the lock-in or agreed term

name: early_termination_penalty_value
label: Early Termination Penalty Value
hint: Enter fixed penalty amount if applicable

name: non_payment_breach_months
label: Non-payment Breach Threshold (months)
hint: Enter the number of months of unpaid rent after which breach action may be initiated

name: illegal_activity_eviction
label: Immediate Eviction for Illegal Activity
hint: Confirm that illegal or unlawful activity is treated as material breach permitting immediate action

name: jurisdiction_city
label: Jurisdiction City
hint: Enter jurisdiction city

name: stamp_duty_paid_by
label: Stamp Duty Paid By
hint: Select stamp duty paid by
